metadata.name: Long-Term Load Forecasting for Resource Planning

description: A resource planner needs a 20-year load forecast for the service territory to inform decisions about building new power plants.

nodes.task_description: Gather long-term economic forecasts for the region, including population growth and business development.

expected_outcome.value: Planner compiles key economic driver data.

nodes.task_description: Forecast the adoption rate of disruptive technologies like rooftop solar, electric vehicles, and energy efficiency measures.

expected_outcome.value: Planner generates adoption curves for key technologies.

nodes.task_description: Combine the economic and technology forecasts into an integrated long-term energy forecast.

expected_outcome.value: System produces a 20-year forecast for both peak demand and annual energy consumption.
